[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [Textmodifier](../../Textmodifier.md) / printAlign

# Method: printAlign()

```ts
printAlign(horizontal, vertical?): void;
```

Sets the text alignment rules for subsequent `print` calls.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `horizontal` | `"center"` \| `"left"` \| `"right"` | Horizontal alignment ('left', 'center', 'right'). |
| `vertical?` | `"top"` \| `"bottom"` \| `"middle"` | Vertical alignment ('top', 'middle', 'bottom'). Defaults to 'top'. |

## Returns

`void`
